parts: Helianthemum guttatum proles bupleurifolium has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, flowers, and roots. side_effects: Helianthemum guttatum proles bupleurifolium can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems.
